## Change type

- [ ] project collection or project data update

## verify

- [ ] Running `python scripts/check-agent-dive.py`
- [ ] Confirmed that there are no accounts, keys, tokens, local private paths or non-desensitized logs
- [ ] If project status is updated, `PROJECTS.md`, `LEARNING_PROGRESS.md`, `meta.json` and `progress.json` are synchronized
- [ ] If it is declared to run/test/source code verification, the evidence has been recorded in the corresponding `evidence.md`
